headers.X-YonerAI-RateLimit-Bucket: status, anonymous, authenticated, user_quota, device_quota, provider_quota, cloud_contract, oracle_queue, or abuse
headers.X-YonerAI-RateLimit-Limit: quota limit for the active bucket
headers.X-YonerAI-RateLimit-Remaining: remaining quota for the active bucket
headers.X-YonerAI-RateLimit-Reset: unix timestamp or RFC3339 reset time
